description: Nitrogen fixing biofertilizer containing Azotobacter and Azospirillum species.
benefits: Fixes atmospheric nitrogen and increases crop yield by 15-20%.

description: Phosphate solubilizing bacteria containing Bacillus megaterium.
benefits: Solubilizes insoluble phosphorus in the soil and makes it available to the plants.

description: Potash mobilizing bacteria containing Frateuria aurantia.
benefits: Mobilizes potassium and improves fruit quality and grain weight.

description: Zinc solubilizing biofertilizer containing Pseudomonas sp.
benefits: Solubilizes zinc and prevents little leaf and zinc deficiency symptoms.

description: Symbiotic nitrogen fixer containing Rhizobium species.
benefits: Nodule formation and nitrogen fixation in legumes.
Enhances root development and water/nutrient absorption from soil.

description: Consortium of N fixing P solubilizing and K mobilizing bacteria.
benefits: Complete nutrient replenishment and boosts overall plant growth.
Improves drought tolerance and crop yield through cytokinin production.
Controls soil-borne fungal pathogens such as Root Rot Collar Rot Wilt and Damping Off.
Controls foliar diseases such as Blast Leaf Spot Sheath Blight and Powdery Mildew.
Broad spectrum bio-fungicide controlling mildews blights and leaf spots.
Controls sucking pests like whitefly thrips aphids and mealybugs.
Controls soil-borne pests like root grubs termites and beetles.
Highly effective against scale insects aphids thrips and jassids.
Parasitizes nematode eggs and controls root-knot and cyst nematodes.

description: Consortium of seaweed extract humic acid fulvic acid and amino acids.
benefits: Improves flower retention fruit setting and metabolic efficiency.
application_method: Foliar spray at pre-flowering and flowering stages

description: Concentrated potassium humate derived from leonardite.
benefits: Improves soil structure CEC and root proliferation.

description: L-form amino acids with chelated micro-nutrients.
benefits: Enables rapid protein synthesis and improves stress tolerance.
application_method: Foliar spray during vegetative and crop stages

description: Enzymatic biostimulant containing growth promoters and vitamins.
benefits: Accelerates growth cell division and enhances crop yields.
Sustained release fertilizer enhancer improving soil fertility.
application_method: Broadcasting in soil during land preparation

benefits: Superb stickiness and absorption for root development.
Enhances permeability of cell membranes and nutrient transport.
Triggers Induced Systemic Resistance (ISR) against fungi and viruses.
Protects crops from heat wave summer stress and sunburn.
application_method: Foliar spray during hot dry seasons

description: Bio-organic potash fertilizer containing organic K sources.
benefits: Supports fruit enlargement and sweetness in crops.

description: Neem-based botanical formulation containing azadirachtin 10000 ppm.
benefits: Broad spectrum botanical insect repellent and feeding deterrent.
Triggers massive branching flowering and yield enhancements.
application_method: Foliar spray during active growth phase

description: Botanical pest controller for sucking pests.
benefits: Rapid action contact insecticide for controlling thrips mites and whitefly.
Dual action: nutrient supply (P and K) and disease suppression (Phytophthora Downy Mildew).
